findings.description: The Methods/Statistical Analysis section contains no citations; every named method, score, guideline, and diagnostic criterion needs a canonical source (found uncited: PRISMA).
findings.suggested_fix: Run /search-lit (paper mode) for canonical methodology sources, sync via /lit-sync, then rerun /verify-refs --strict.

findings.description: Cited references (0) are below the meta_analysis target (40-80).
findings.suggested_fix: Run /search-lit (paper mode) to retrieve verified candidates across the six categories, sync via /lit-sync, then rerun /verify-refs --strict.
